blocking_conditions.upstream_admission: The public capability report does not admit a production native Ceres hot loop with production pressure and speciation derivatives; Issue 12 remains the execution gate.

claim_boundary: This receipt freezes data admission and grouped splits only. It is not a completed fit, parameter promotion, independent-validation result, or submission claim.
failed_row_policy: Every attempted reserved row remains in validation accounting; solver failure is a failed prediction and may not be omitted or replaced.

parameter_coverage.current_hole: no primary measured pure-MEA package covering all fitted ranges and association observables
parameter_coverage.direct_evidence: repo-local pure-component parameter provenance and unloaded Amundsen density
parameter_coverage.indirect_evidence: mixture VLE sensitivity and literature correlations
parameter_coverage.promotion_restriction: Do not refit pure parameters until measured target identity units ranges and covariance are frozen.

parameter_coverage.current_hole: binary MEA-water VLE leads are not yet transcribed from Cai Park or Kim primary tables
parameter_coverage.direct_evidence: 327-row canonical VLE registry including binary/CO2-loaded solution sources
parameter_coverage.indirect_evidence: unloaded density and published parameter comparisons
parameter_coverage.promotion_restriction: Promotion requires primary-table extraction with composition basis pressure uncertainty and grouped source splits.

parameter_coverage.current_hole: physical CO2/N2O solubility excess enthalpy and heat-of-absorption packages remain unextracted
parameter_coverage.direct_evidence: 161-row active VLE view plus Idris uncertainty and Wong paired loading evidence
parameter_coverage.indirect_evidence: Amundsen loaded density; physical-solubility and calorimetry leads
parameter_coverage.promotion_restriction: Fit only admitted VLE families until public ePC-SAFT capabilities and primary evidence admit additional observables.

parameter_coverage.current_hole: no direct exact-salt volumetric data and no independently sourced covariance for the analog counterion terms
parameter_coverage.direct_evidence: 128 direct exact-cation analog densities; 103 Amundsen densities; 74 active-v1 speciation states with explicit membership
parameter_coverage.indirect_evidence: 44 reported-derived excess molar volumes; Maiti bulk carbamation context; 37 non-30-wt-percent transferability states and balance-inferred species
parameter_coverage.promotion_restriction: Use the frozen parameter-observable map and grouped validation; analog salts cannot uniquely identify single-ion terms and inferred balances cannot become direct observations.

parameter_coverage.current_hole: no verified static relative-permittivity table across composition temperature and loading
parameter_coverage.indirect_evidence: Hajj microwave-dispersion metadata and unresolved Hsieh Floriano Nascimento leads
parameter_coverage.promotion_restriction: MEA solvation promotion is blocked until frequency basis static-limit method and primary values are verified.

parameter_coverage.current_hole: direct osmotic or mean-activity evidence for the target ion pair is absent
parameter_coverage.direct_evidence: no direct MEAH+/MEACOO- activity dataset identified
parameter_coverage.promotion_restriction: Analog counterions must remain labeled analog and cannot directly promote MEAH+-MEACOO- interaction parameters.

parameter_coverage.current_hole: Fan and Du Preez primary numeric speciation plus calibrated loaded-MEA equilibrium pH are unavailable
parameter_coverage.direct_evidence: canonical reaction-constant sources and direct aggregate speciation roles
parameter_coverage.indirect_evidence: Fan pH/dissociation-derived species and provisional literature estimates
parameter_coverage.promotion_restriction: Preserve direct inferred and model-derived roles; no abstract or process-monitoring pH may enter regression.

target_admission.admission_reason: Canonical pressure rows and public target support are present; execution remains gated separately.
target_admission.observable: CO2 partial pressure over loaded MEA
target_admission.weight: log-pressure family weight frozen at preregistration

target_admission.admission_reason: Only membership-approved direct and aggregate observations are targets; inferred context stays non-target.
The package reports density-target support but the approved MEA adapter and target schema do not implement it.
No public reactive-regression viscosity target capability is reported.
Public target support exists but no verified static-permittivity dataset or approved downstream adapter exists.
target_admission.observable: MEA-water and loaded-MEA static relative permittivity

target_admission.admission_reason: The screened process-monitoring lead is not an equilibrium pH target and the public target family is unreported.
target_admission.observable: calibrated equilibrium pH of loaded MEA

target_admission.admission_reason: Generic activity support cannot substitute for absent direct target-ion evidence or an approved adapter.
target_admission.observable: MEAH+ and MEACOO- activity or osmotic evidence

target_admission.admission_reason: No public reactive-regression calorimetry target capability or frozen primary dataset is available.
